productDisplayName: Skechers Women Silver Pink White Shoe
description: Ideal for running, this pair of sneakers from skechers double up as lifestyle shoes. While the soft footbed takes the natural curve of your feet, the perforated upper keep your feet fresh and clean. The lace-up system of the shoes ensure that the shoe fits sungly around and keeps your foot firm on the ground, while the highly technical outsole will accelerate your speed when on the run!Upper Mesh and synthetic upper with synthetic lacing Perforated side panels with metallic side strips for cooling effect Stitch accents with logo detail on the side Padded collar and tongue Toe guard lining in synthetic leather Midsole Midsole made of Resalyte which increases cushioning for enhanced shock absorption Outsole Square lugs and horizontal ridges on the outsole to provide superior grip High abrasion rubber toe box embedded on the upper for shock absorption Wash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
